arts.ttl: Tottenham v Elfsborg, Rangers v Union Saint-Gilloise, and more: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the final round of league-phase matches Join Michael Butler for Steaua v Manchester United Live scoreboard | How they stand | Email Scott GOAL! Braga 1-0 Lazio (Horta 6). Victor Gómez advances down the right and cuts back for his captain Ricardo Horta, who whips into the bottom left. A lovely goal, and so Braga are on for the win they need to survive. Lazio, the table toppers, have little or nothing to play for. Tottenham Hotspur 0-0 Elfsborg. A sprightly start for Spurs as Mikey Moore spins in from the right touchline and attacks the visiting defence. The ball’s switched to Son Heung-Min on the other flank. A scuffed shot. But a promising early attack. Continue reading...
